descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 to reach Centennial Cup final against Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes advanced to the Centennial Cup Tier II Junior A hockey championship final by defeating the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 on Thursday in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. The Sockeyes faced the Humboldt Broncos in Saturday's final. Richmond's nine scorers were Dean Rutledge, Steve Jaques, Matt Hervey, Brian Kozak, Paul Rutherford, Jason Phillips, Tony Bobbitt, Mike McCormick, and Bill Hardy.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes gain final in Centennial Cup
